steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: You are new in America. You are moving into Apartment 4B. Oh no! Your big boxes just fell on the floor.
steps.text_cn: 你刚来到美国，正在搬进4B公寓。糟了！你的大箱子全摔在地上了。

steps.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
steps.text: Oh dear! Are you okay? I live right next door in 4A. Let me help you.
steps.text_cn: 哎呀！你还好吗？我就住隔壁4A。我来帮你。

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: Hi! Are you the new neighbor? I'm Jake in 5B, right above you. I can take the heavy boxes.
steps.text_cn: 嗨！你是新邻居吗？我是楼上5B的Jake，就在你正上方。重箱子我来搬。

steps.instruction: 请把下列英文与对应的中文意思配对。
steps.speech_text: Match these words: next door, right above you, downstairs.
steps.feedback: Nice! You know where your neighbors live! / 很棒！你知道邻居们住哪儿了！
steps.feedback_wrong: Almost! 'Next door' means 隔壁, 'right above you' means 你正楼上, 'downstairs' means 楼下。

steps.speaker: You
steps.text: Thank you... both of you. Sorry, my English is not great.
steps.text_cn: 谢谢你们两位。不好意思，我英语不太好。

steps.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
steps.text: Oh honey, don't worry about that. Now — I baked scones this morning. You're taking some.
steps.text_cn: 亲爱的，别担心这个。对了，我早上烤了司康，你一定要拿一些。

steps.instruction: "Your heater's off." — What does Jake mean?
steps.feedback: Correct! The heater is off — no heat! / 对了！暖气关着——没有暖气！
steps.feedback_wrong: Almost! 'Heater's off' means the heating is not working. / 'Heater's off' 意思是暖气没开。

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: Let me check... Ah, it's closed. The guy before you must've closed it when he left.
steps.text_cn: 我看看……啊，是关着的。你之前住这里的人离开时肯定把它关了。

steps.instruction: Jake: "The guy before you must've closed it when he left." 你接下来该问什么？
steps.feedback: Good question! You want to know about the last person here. / 好问题！你想知道之前住这里的人。
steps.feedback_wrong: Almost! Jake mentioned 'the guy before you' — you'd naturally ask 'Who lived here before?' / Jake提到了'之前的人'——你自然会问'之前谁住这里？'

steps.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
steps.text: My son used to live with me — right here in 4A. Then he wanted his own home. He moved into 4B to be near me.
steps.text_cn: 我儿子以前跟我一起住，就在4A。后来他想有自己的家，就搬进4B，好离我近一点。

steps.instruction: "My son used to live with me." — Why did Mrs. Henderson's son move into 4B before you?
steps.feedback: Right! Her son got a place of his own. / 对！她的儿子想要独立空间。
steps.feedback_wrong: Almost! She said 'my son' — her son lived in 4B for his own place. / 她说了'my son'——她的儿子住在4B因为想要独立空间。
steps.review_word: Her son wanted his own place.

options.label: A
options.text: Her son wanted his own place.

options.label: B
options.text: Her son didn't love Mrs. Henderson.

options.label: C
options.text: Mrs. Henderson's brother wanted to move into 4A.

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: Yeah. That was two years ago. One day he just left. We don't know where he went.
steps.text_cn: 是啊。那是两年前的事了。有一天他突然走了。我们不知道他去了哪里。

steps.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
steps.text: That's a story for another day, dear. Do you have enough blankets?
steps.text_cn: 亲爱的，那是以后再说的故事。你的毯子够吗？

steps.instruction: Mrs. Henderson is asking if you need blankets. Answer quickly!
steps.feedback: Quick and polite! 'I think so' is a great soft answer. / 又快又礼貌！'I think so' 是很好的委婉回答。
steps.feedback_wrong: Almost! She asked about blankets — 'I think so, thank you' fits best. / 她问的是毯子够不够——'I think so, thank you' 最合适。

steps.speaker: You
steps.text: I think so... Mrs. Henderson, thank you. Really.
steps.text_cn: 我想够了……Henderson太太，谢谢你。真的谢谢。

steps.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
steps.text: Call me Ruth, honey. You can knock on my door anytime. Good night.
steps.text_cn: 叫我Ruth就好，亲爱的。你随时都可以来敲我的门。晚安。

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: That night, after Jake and Mrs. Henderson leave, you open your boxes. The apartment is clean, but you see things from the last person. A hook on the wall where a picture used to hang. A coffee ring on the kitchen counter. You open a drawer in the kitchen and see a small yellow paper:
steps.text_cn: 那天晚上，Jake和Henderson太太离开后，你打开箱子。公寓很干净，但你看见了上一个住户留下的痕迹：墙上曾挂画的钩子，厨房台面上的咖啡杯印。你打开厨房抽屉，看见一张黄色小纸条：

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: You look at the paper for a long time. Then, you close the drawer.
steps.text_cn: 你盯着那张纸看了很久。然后，你关上了抽屉。

steps.instruction: 用下列词块拼出正确句子（含1个干扰块）。
steps.feedback: Perfect! Now you can tell someone about the heating. / 完美！现在你可以告诉别人暖气的情况了。
steps.feedback_wrong: Almost! The correct sentence is 'Your heater is off.' / 正确句子是 'Your heater is off.'（你的暖气关着。）

steps.feedback: Great pronunciation! You sound natural. / 发音很棒！听起来很自然。
steps.feedback_wrong: Almost! Try again: WHO lived HERE before? Stress the bold words. / 再试一次：重读WHO和HERE。
